step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Philip Osborne recalled under hypnosis a frightening incident in the Smokey Mountains during the summer of 1949-50. While his family was retrieving a coat from a parking lot at night, a metallic disc with a luminous geodesic dome landed. He felt himself drawn into the ship, where he lay in a hospital-like room. An arm-like device made an incision in his leg, leaving a scar, and an eye-like device appeared above him. He experienced flying through space and seeing stars but did not recall what happened to his family or seeing any beings.

encounter_events.source_citation: he recalled a Metallic disc with a luMinous geodesic doMe (or a sphere)
encounter_events.ai_justification: A metallic disc with a luminous geodesic dome matches the domed disk/Saturn shape description.
Light from the craft causing eye irritation matches eye troubles motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: This object landed on vertical supports
encounter_events.ai_justification: Vertical supports on which the craft landed correspond to landing gear.
A wedge-like section opening on the craft describes a door or opening.

encounter_events.source_citation: He felt hiMself drawn into the ship, perhaps by flotation or carried on a stretcher
encounter_events.ai_justification: Being drawn into the ship by a force, possibly flotation, matches the levitation/drawing force motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: found hiMself lying down in a hospital-like rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness lying down in a hospital-like room corresponds to lying on an examining table or couch.
A hospital-like room inside the craft corresponds to an examination room.
Light surrounding the witness without a specific source matches bright and uniform lighting.

encounter_events.source_citation: His initial anxiety gave way to relaxation
encounter_events.ai_justification: Anxiety giving way to relaxation during the encounter matches the pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: an arMlike device Made an incision in his leg, taking out soMething or reMoving a saMple
encounter_events.ai_justification: An arm-like device making an incision in the witness's leg matches beings making an incision for unknown purpose.
A scar remaining from the incision matches the linear or circular scar aftereffect.

encounter_events.source_citation: An eye (?) like device (or intent organic eye) appeared above hiM
encounter_events.ai_justification: An eye-like device appearing above the witness matches the eyelike device descending from ceiling and scanning the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: he seeMed to fly through space and see stars
encounter_events.ai_justification: Seeming to fly through space while lying on a table suggests an out-of-body experience or visionary state.

encounter_events.source_citation: He did not recall what happened to the rest of his faMily
encounter_events.ai_justification: In this multi-witness family scenario, the witness has no memory of what happened to the other family members, matching the rule of differential memory.
The craft described as metallic matches the silvery metallic surface description.
